tools.name: list_framework_tools
tools.description: List dependency-free tools/ wrappers (git_tool, test_runner_tool, etc.).

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create an Explorer, Worker, Reviewer, or Verifier task card.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks from ownership.json with optional status/role filters.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get a task by id including task card markdown when present.

tools.name: update_task_status
tools.description: Update task status via update_task_status.py (syncs gates).

tools.name: record_result
tools.description: Write a result report JSON/Markdown and sync status.

tools.name: check_path_allowed
tools.description: Check whether a path is allowed for a task (read/write).

tools.name: record_touched_paths
tools.description: Append files_changed to a task result report.

tools.name: request_skill_use
tools.description: Request approval to use a skill for a task.

tools.name: approve_skill_use
tools.description: Approve or deny a skill-use request.

tools.name: record_finding
tools.description: Append a reviewer finding to findings/review-findings.json.

task.objective: Real MCP stdio end-to-end test from Claude Code driver

result.summary: Driven by stdio test driver — verified MCP round-trip

finding.summary: MCP stdio end-to-end driver successfully exercised create_task/list_tasks/record_result.
